Your Utility Bill Funded a Lobby Campaign Against You

We traced $2.3M in ratepayer money to political ads opposing the very regulations that would lower your bills.

The fee on your bill labeled 'system improvement' is funding political ads.

Money trail: Ratepayer funds → PAC → Attack ads — Your monthly bill includes a 'system improvement charge' — $4.20 of every $100 goes to political spending

The attack ads used your money to spread misinformation about policies that would help you.
